score_formula: score(c,p) = mean(.X over panel_genes_measured) - mean(.X over matched controls)

binning.universe: all 18130 finite assay-present genes (var_names), before pruning
binning.statistic: per-gene mean of .X over all 396000 cells

pool.definition: detected_in_396k minus the 53 present program/activation marker genes

draw.select: 50 lowest hex digests per occupied marker bin, no replacement
draw.digest_tie: digest_hex ascending, then var_name index ascending
draw.occupied_bin_definition: bins containing the program's detected (measured) panel genes

activation_predictor_draw.note: controls for the activation-adjusted CD4 CTL-like sensitivity lane; display/sensitivity-only; never a Stage-2 pole

intended_only_absent.note: absent from var; recorded intended-only; never scored

residual_correlation_note: program-order-invariant draws remove DIRECT cross-panel leakage; they do NOT make programs biologically or statistically independent. Shared controls and genuine co-expression can still correlate programs; residual correlation is measured and reported in validation, never asserted away.

independent_verification.method: independent code: chunked float64 CSR column-means -> divN bins -> detected pool -> own keyed-hash draws
independent_verification.result: 11/11 programs byte-identical control sets; 1950 rows, 0 mismatches on (program_id,bin,rank_in_bin); reproduced detected=17956, control_eligible_pool=17903, bin24_eligible=715, bin0_eligible=552, marker union 54 present 53 absent [HLA-DRA]
